description_long: This is a pair of aviator-style sunglasses featuring large, teardrop-shaped lenses set within a thin, metallic full-rim frame. The lenses are dark and opaque, providing significant coverage and a classic, timeless look. The frame includes a double bridge design, with a prominent top bar and adjustable nose pads for comfort. The temples are slender and straight, curving gently at the ends with black plastic tips for secure placement behind the ears. The overall construction is lightweight and streamlined, emphasizing both style and practicality. No visible brand markings or decorative embellishments are present on the frame or lenses.
description: Aviator sunglasses with dark teardrop lenses, thin metallic frame, and black-tipped temples. Classic, minimalist design with a double bridge and adjustable nose pads.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, dark teardrop lenses, thin metallic frame, and double bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim metallic temple and black plastic tip, with the lens profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the adjustable nose pads, the curvature of the temples, and the full rim around the lenses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the slim temple and black tip, with the lens edge and frame profile visible.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is a thin, full-rim aviator style with a teardrop lens geometry, featuring a double bridge and slender, straight temples that curve at the ends.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark green, fully opaque, and uniform in color with no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a double-bar design with a straight top bar and a lower bar connecting the lenses, accompanied by adjustable nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin and metallic, straight with a gentle curve at the ends, and finished with black plastic tips; no visible patterns or engravings.
